title: hieracium levicaule subsp. borszekense
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. borszekense is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly referred to as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hieracium levicaule subsp. borszekense include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
